ejection_fraction.notes: Use the average of PanEcho and EchoPrime EF; flag if they differ by more than 5 percentage points.

pulmonary_artery_pressure.notes: Average RVSP (PanEcho) and PAP (EchoPrime); flag if difference >5 mmHg.

pericardial_effusion.notes: Call effusion present if either model probability exceeds its threshold; PanEcho threshold set low to capture even small effusions.

left_atrium_dilation.notes: Treat mild LA enlargement as positive; PanEcho >0.3 triggers enlargement even if EchoPrime is silent.

right_atrium_dilation.notes: Capture mild RA enlargement with PanEcho if probability >=0.3.

right_ventricle_dilation.notes: Prefer PanEcho for mild RV enlargement; EchoPrime often misses subtle cases.

rv_systolic_function_depressed.notes: Label RV dysfunction if either model probability crosses its threshold; PanEcho threshold reduced to avoid false positives for mild dysfunction.

mitral_regurgitation.notes: Require EchoPrime to give non-zero probability to call significant MR; PanEcho alone must be highly confident (>0.8) to override.

tricuspid_valve_regurgitation.notes: Follow same strategy as MR: treat moderate/severe TR as positive only if EchoPrime shows any evidence or PanEcho >0.8.

aortic_regurgitation.notes: Identify moderate or severe aortic regurgitation only when EchoPrime indicates presence or PanEcho probability exceeds 0.8.

aortic_stenosis.notes: PanEcho’s AVStenosis groups mild and moderate; thus treat only very high PanEcho confidence (>0.9) or any EchoPrime indication as significant AS.

mitral_stenosis.notes: MS is rare; label present if either model probability >=0.5.

tricuspid_stenosis.notes: PanEcho does not predict tricuspid stenosis; rely solely on EchoPrime.

bicuspid_aortic_valve.notes: Either model can detect bicuspid aortic valve.

mitral_annular_calcification.notes: Only EchoPrime outputs MAC; threshold at 0.5.

mitraclip.notes: Detect presence of MitraClip device via EchoPrime.

pacemaker.notes: EchoPrime outputs pacemaker; require probability >0.5 to call presence.

tavr.notes: Detect transcatheter aortic valve replacement via EchoPrime.

dilated_ivc.notes: High right atrial pressure or dilated IVC: call positive if either model probability >=0.5.
